basic_details.job_title: Rajiv Gandhi University Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Rajiv Gandhi University (Central University), Arunachal Pradesh
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi University Teaching Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://rgu.ac.in/. A total of 03 vacancies have been announced through the RGU Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.venue: Chamber of Dean, Faculty of Physical Education, Rajiv Gandhi University

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: | Master’s Degree in Physical Education (M.P.Ed) or Master in Physical Education and Sports (M.P.E.S) from a recognized University with at least 55% marks in aggregate (50% for SC/ST/OBC candidates) or equivalent grade. The candidate must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC or been awarded a Ph.D. Degree as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016 (exempted from NET/SLET/SET). | Desirable Qualifications: | Experience in Teaching, training, or coaching sportspersons at National-level or higher competitions. Evidence of participation in National or International competitions. | Age Limit: As per University norms.

how_to_apply: Candidates must appear for the Walk-in Interview on the specified date.
Prepare your Bio-data mentioning qualifications, experience, and specialization.
Bring original documents along with self-attested photocopies of all supporting certificates.
Report at the Chamber of Dean, Faculty of Physical Education, Rajiv Gandhi University on 24-07-2026 at 10:00 AM.
In case of unforeseen circumstances (natural calamity, bandh, etc.), the interview will be held on the next working day.
important_instructions: This is a purely temporary engagement for one semester (extendable if required). No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For further details, contact the concerned Head at 7896920345 (M).

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: Master’s Degree in Physical Education (M.P.Ed) or Master in Physical Education and Sports (M.P.E.S) from a recognized University with at least 55% marks in aggregate (50% for SC/ST/OBC candidates) or equivalent grade. The candidate must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC or been awarded a Ph.D. Degree as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016 (exempted from NET/SLET/SET). Desirable Qualifications: Experience in Teaching, training, or coaching sportspersons at National-level or higher competitions. Evidence of participation in National or International competitions. Age Limit: As per University norms.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 Job Description
content_sections.text: Teaching Assistants will assist in academic and practical classes in the Department of Physical Education.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates must appear for the Walk-in Interview on the specified date. Step-by-Step Process: Prepare your Bio-data mentioning qualifications, experience, and specialization. Bring original documents along with self-attested photocopies of all supporting certificates. Carry 2 recent passport-size photographs. Report at the Chamber of Dean, Faculty of Physical Education, Rajiv Gandhi University on 24-07-2026 at 10:00 AM. In case of unforeseen circumstances (natural calamity, bandh, etc.), the interview will be held on the next working day.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions:
content_sections.text: This is a purely temporary engagement for one semester (extendable if required). No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For further details, contact the concerned Head at 7896920345 (M).

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for Rajiv Gandhi University Teaching Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 24 July 2026 at 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many Teaching Assistant posts are vacant in Rajiv Gandhi University Physical Education Department?
faq.answer: There are 03 (Three) posts of Teaching Assistants.

faq.question: Q3. What is the remuneration for Teaching Assistant at Rajiv Gandhi University?
faq.answer: Consolidated salary of Rs. 1,000/- per class (Maximum Rs. 40,000/- per month).

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for RGU Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: M.P.Ed / M.P.E.S with minimum 55% marks (50% for reserved categories) + NET or PhD as per UGC norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is NET mandatory for Rajiv Gandhi University Teaching Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, unless the candidate has a PhD as per UGC Regulations.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the Rajiv Gandhi University Teaching Assistant Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: In the Chamber of Dean, Faculty of Physical Education, Rajiv Gandhi University.

faq.question: Q7. Is the Teaching Assistant position at RGU permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary for one semester (extendable based on requirement).

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for RGU Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Bio-data, original certificates, self-attested photocopies, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is prior coaching experience required for Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: Experience in teaching/coaching at National level is desirable.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for Rajiv Gandhi University Teaching Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: Directly appear for the Walk-in Interview on 24-07-2026 with all required documents.
